title: Feasibility, Alternatives, Risk Experiments, and Stop Decisions · Product Reasoning Brief: Alternative Analysis
summary: A long capstone plan assumes access to data, users, infrastructure, expertise, approvals, integrations, time, and operating budget that have not been tested. Predict the decision, affected people, evidence strength, failure cost, and transfer limit before seeing a worked case. Planned artifact: Add and verify the capstone alternative analysis increment in feasibility proof and alternative decision record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debug…
objectives: Compare build, buy, configure, integrate, simplify, manual service, policy change, partnership, and no-build alternatives.
Inventory time, skill, access, authority, data, technology, service, policy, cost, support, and maintenance constraints with owners.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Predict Alternative Analysis · Theory Alternative Analysis
steps.instruction:
theory case — The plan assumes unavailable data, participants, approval, services, expertise, operating budget, and time while rejecting no-build alternatives. The theory variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Alternative Analysis contract for the supplied data.

steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for compare build, buy, configure, integrate, simplify, manual service, policy change, partnership, and no-build alternatives. For Predict Alternative Analysis · Theory Alternative Analysis, keep Alternative Analysis connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: Compare build, buy, configure, integrate, simplify, manual service, policy change, partnership, and no-build alternatives. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name the stakeholder decision, affected people, authority, assumption, revision, artifact, observable behavior, changed case, rejected failure, accessibility, security, privacy, operation, recovery, contribution, residual risk, and transfer limit; then calibrate the public claim to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Alternative Analysis while producing feasibility proof and alternative decision record.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: The plan assumes unavailable data, participants, approval, services, expertise, operating budget, and time while rejecting no-build alternatives. The worked example variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Compare build, buy, configure, integrate, simplify, manual service, policy change, partnership, and no-build alternatives. A defensible solution applies Alternative Analysis, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to feasibility proof and alternative decision record.

content.code:
# Worked focus: capstone-alternative-analysis — Compare build, buy, configure, integrate, simplify, manual service, policy change, partnership, and no-build alternatives.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: changed-product-4
focus: capstone-alternative-analysis
decision-evidence: Compare build, buy, configure, integrate, simplify, manual service, policy change, partnership, and no-build alternatives.
stakeholder: affected-user review panel
decision: continue only if the changed task meets its outcome and guardrails
artifact: revision-bound evidence packet
claim: one bounded behavior survives the changed context
verify: reproduce the task, inspect the artifact, and compare the predeclared measure
changed-case: different access need, input, constraint, and dependency failure
failure: reject plausible output without causal, human, recovery, or ownership evidence
repair: isolate the first unsupported transition, correct it, and add a regression
owner: named learner and stakeholder reviewer
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research and release environment
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

stimulus.title: Alternative Analysis failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed

options.text: For repair the alternative analysis defect, apply Alternative Analysis without its stated preconditions, omit the feasibility proof and alternative decision record trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Alternative Analysis for feasibility proof and alternative decision record.
Reconstruct the conditions for Alternative Analysis, gather a counterexample, repair the artifact, and add a regression case.

Keep the Alternative Analysis artifact unchanged and rewrite its explanation so the unsupported output appears intentional. That claim fails the repair the alternative analysis defect evidence boundary for Alternative Analysis.

steps.title: Build Alternative Analysis evidence · Theory Alternative Analysis
steps.instruction:
Append a capstone-alternative-analysis-15qmhx: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.

Evidence target: Build Alternative Analysis evidence · Theory Alternative Analysis.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Alternative Analysis into observable performance evidence. For Build Alternative Analysis evidence · Theory Alternative Analysis, keep Alternative Analysis connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Alternative Analysis structural check is only one gate. feasibility proof and alternative decision record must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

steps.title: Defend the Alternative Analysis model · Theory Alternative Analysis
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Alternative Analysis: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — The plan assumes unavailable data, participants, approval, services, expertise, operating budget, and time while rejecting no-build alternatives. The theory variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Compare build, buy, configure, integrate, simplify, manual service, policy change, partnership, and no-build alternatives.

Evidence target: Defend the Alternative Analysis model · Theory Alternative Analysis.
steps.why: Retrieving Alternative Analysis through the concrete feasibility proof and alternative decision record case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Defend the Alternative Analysis model · Theory Alternative Analysis, keep Alternative Analysis connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Compare build, buy, configure, integrate, simplify, manual service, policy change, partnership, and no-build alternatives.
